name: Bourbon Balls
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:15
Combine vanilla wafers, pecans, powdered sugar, and cocoa in a large bowl; stir well. Combine corn syrup and bourbon, stirring well. Pour bourbon mixture over wafer mixture; stir until blended. Shape into 1-inch balls; roll in additional powdered sugar. Yield: 4 dozen.
